title: The Forbidden Spark
summary: In a matriarchal world where magic is forbidden to men, a young male slave hides a terrifying power that could shatter the social order. With only his sister to rely on against cruel mistresses, he must choose between survival and rebellion.
plot_outline: Living in the shadow of the Obsidian Spire, Kaelen toils under the whip of the matriarchy, hiding his burgeoning arcane abilities from the mistresses who demand absolute obedience. When his sister Elara is threatened with a fate worse than death for a minor transgression, Kaelen is forced to expose his forbidden magic to save her, triggering a manhunt that drives them into the perilous wilds. As they flee, Kaelen must master his volatile powers and uncover the lost history of male mages to topple the oppressive regime before the High Matriarchs hunt them down.
